---
title: "Modeling behavioral response networks as large language models"
image: "../images/card_pics/female_slas.jpg"
description: "This project treats animal behavioral interactions as networks inspired by large language models, using behavior sequences to predict responses, uncover hidden patterns, and understand how individuals and groups coordinate actions in complex ecological systems."
categories: ["Deep Tropics Project"]
contributors: "BCL"
feature_order: "h"
format:
  html:
    toc: FALSE
---
